note: v0 coarse baseline. The dataset taxonomy is coarser than schema/labels.json; several canonical labels are lumped. Output labels stay within the canonical enum so the contract remains valid.

coarse_notes.fungal_malassezia: coarse 'fungal' bucket; also contains dermatophytosis, not separated in v0
coarse_notes.atopic_dermatitis: coarse 'hypersensitivity' bucket; also contains allergic_contact_dermatitis, not separated in v0
coarse_notes.healthy: OOD/negative class, not a canonical condition
